text.title: Requirements Traceability Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.

branch.question: Does the tracking tool provide native traceability?

conclusion.verdict: Use the tool's native traceability; RTM is a cached export.
Maintain RTM manually via rtm_min.py CI job.

example.trace: audit=true → native=false → manual RTM, regenerated per PR; coverage=92%, 3 orphans.
